mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interaction (user_id, product_id, action_type, action_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{actionType}, #{actionTime})
mapper.select: SELECT i.product_id FROM interaction i JOIN product p ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE i.user_id = #{userId} AND i.action_type = 2 ORDER BY i.action_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
